item.title: Reading for the Sake of Writing
item.description: I don’t read as much as I should. I have stacks upon stacks of books — spilling out of a bookshelf and across my desk, my coffee table, my other shelves — that are, for the most part, unread. Like many readers, I have a peculiar habit of frequently adding to my library and never quite catching up with it, and the time that I actually set aside for reading is becoming less and less.
